items.original_body:
For long lasting flows, the flow score is incremented periodically and thus it creates two problems:
- it is not clear from the screenshot below the discrepancy between the issue detected and the flow score
- long-lasting flows with tiny issues will become big over time

![Screen Shot 2021-01-29 at 16 51 18](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/4493366/106296644-3b7fbe80-6252-11eb-8ec8-c9db401236c0.png)

It is requested to avoid incrementing multiple times the flow score over the same issue.
items.mutated_title: It is requested to prevent incrementing multiple times the flow score over the same issue.

items.original_body:
Hi,
this might a bit of an edge case issue but it caused a bit of confusion for me so I thought it might be good to document. I have the case where I load a timeseries (fbpic) in a jupyter notebook via `d = LpaDiagnostics('lab_diags/hdf5', backend='openpmd-api')`, and retrieve the fields with `d.get_field()`. Now I changed reran the simulation (going from 2 to 3 theta modes). After rerunning the cell to import the timeseries get_field() still returns the old fields now. With `backend='h5py'` I get the new data as expected. 
Is there some sort of caching going on with the openpmd-api that needs to be cleared?

I have the case where I load a timeseries (fbpic) in a notebook via d = LpaDiagnostics('lab_diags/hdf5', backend='openpmd-api'), and retrieve the fields with d.get_field(). Now I changed reran the simulation (going from 2 to 3 theta modes). After rerunning the cell to import the timeseries get_field() still returns the old fields now. With backend='h5py' I get the new data as expected. Is there some sort of caching going on with the openpmd-api that needs to be cleared?

items.original_body:
So WCM hasn't been updated in a long time. We really should update it, but Will is the only real maintainer of it.

Related to #285 

Things to update:

- [x] Update UI, it kinda looks dumb (#338)
- [x] Picker to get only certain items, and a certain amount.
- [x] Squish Inventory Hacks into a squishier area
- [ ] Auto-run assignRandomSpells when a broken pet is detected
- [x] Update Battle hacks
- [x] Remove "test"
- [x] Update broken hacks in Miscellaneous (snowball crasher, finish tutorial) (#316)
- [x] Add more miscellaneous hacks
- [x] Custom morph hacks
- [x] Add more validation to battle hacks (#252)
- [x] OwO text(#359)
- [x] Remove archives from teleport (#255)
- [x] Player state saving (issue: #283, PR: #349)
- [x] Arena Points Button

items.original_body: Date and Time classes don't use patterns from OS regional parameters. Instead of them they use patterns from java.
items.mutated_body: Date and Time classes don't use patterns from OS regional parameters. Instead of them they use patterns from java.

items.original_title: CLI crashes when the config file is missing
items.original_body: Running the command without a config file raises an uncaught exception instead of showing a helpful error.
items.mutated_title: How do I install the CLI on Windows?
items.mutated_body: I am new to this project and would like to know the correct installation steps for Windows.
